metadata.description: soilSpoon's agent skills — trust-first engineering workflow + productivity skills

plugins.name: slice
plugins.description: Trust-first recursive decomposition engine: baseline → vertical slices → Canon-TDD leaves → adversarial verification → per-leaf commits → deterministic integrate + owner's briefing. Installs the /slice skill and the 4 role subagents.

plugins.name: dev-toolkit
plugins.description: Engineering fundamentals & diagnostics: language-agnostic code-quality core (가독성/예측가능성/응집도/결합도), Toss frontend fundamentals (a11y/React/디자인토큰), build-config drift detection, issue root-cause workflow.

plugins.name: job-hunt
plugins.description: Job application automation: resume tailoring with fit evaluation, Wishket application workflow.

plugins.name: research-tools
plugins.description: Verification & web research: 6-agent parallel fact-checking, human-like browser automation.
